_meta.description: Singapore payer seed data: NPHC + MediShield Life + major private insurers (Phase 40 Superseding)
_meta.source: Ministry of Health Singapore + Monetary Authority of Singapore Insurer Directory
_meta.notes: MediShield Life is the universal public base insurance. NPHC (National Programme for Healthcare Claims) is the national claims gateway. Integrated Shield Plans (IP) are private top-ups.

payers.name: National Programme for Healthcare Claims (NPHC)
payers.enrollmentNotes: All licensed healthcare institutions must connect to NPHC for MediShield Life / MediSave claims. API-based submission with SingPass CorpPass authentication.

endpoints.notes: NPHC REST API. Requires CorpPass authentication + MOH facility license.
MediShield Life eligibility check via NPHC

payers.name: MediSave (Central Provident Fund Board)
payers.enrollmentNotes: MediSave claims routed through NPHC for approved procedures. MediSave withdrawal limits apply.

payers.name: Prudential Assurance Company Singapore
payers.enrollmentNotes: Integrated Shield Plan provider. Claims via insurer portal + NPHC for MediSave component.

payers.name: NTUC Income Insurance Co-operative Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: Integrated Shield Plan: IncomeShield. Claims via insurer portal.

payers.name: Great Eastern Life Assurance Co. Ltd
payers.enrollmentNotes: Integrated Shield Plan: GREAT SupremeHealth. Claims via insurer portal.

payers.name: AIA Singapore Private Limited
payers.enrollmentNotes: Integrated Shield Plan: AIA HealthShield Gold Max. Claims via AIA provider portal.
